'''tamazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swampland|swampland]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swampland|swampland]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tamazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmæzhæth|tæmæzhæth]] || [[word:tæmæzhæj|tæmæzhæj]] || [[word:tæmæzhæsh|tæmæzhæsh]] || [[word:tæmæzhæ|tæmæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamamazhath|tamamazhath]] || [[word:tamamazhaj|tamamazhaj]] || [[word:tamamazhash|tamamazhash]] || [[word:tamamazha|tamamazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamazhath|tamazhath]] || [[word:tamazhaj|tamazhaj]] || [[word:tamazhash|tamazhash]] || [[word:tamazha|tamazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamafzhath|tamafzhath]] || [[word:tamafzhaj|tamafzhaj]] || [[word:tamafzhash|tamafzhash]] || [[word:tamafzhaf|tamafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamazhatha|tamazhatha]] || [[word:tamazhaja|tamazhaja]] || [[word:tamazhasha|tamazhasha]] || [[word:tamazhaka|tamazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamazhath|tamazhath]] || [[word:tamazhaj|tamazhaj]] || [[word:tamazhash|tamazhash]] || [[word:tamazha|tamazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamazhathal|tamazhathal]] || [[word:tamazhajal|tamazhajal]] || [[word:tamazhashal|tamazhashal]] || [[word:tamazhakal|tamazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamazhathatha|tamazhathatha]] || [[word:tamazhajaja|tamazhajaja]] || [[word:tamazhashasha|tamazhashasha]] || [[word:tamazhaka|tamazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamazhathan|tamazhathan]] || [[word:tamazhajan|tamazhajan]] || [[word:tamazhashan|tamazhashan]] || [[word:tamazhakan|tamazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamazhathaoro|tamazhathaoro]] || [[word:tamazhajaoro|tamazhajaoro]] || [[word:tamazhashaoro|tamazhashaoro]] || [[word:tamazhakaoro|tamazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
